evidence: Activation energy resonates strongly with catalyzing change (interconnection.catalytic), initiating transformation (temporal.transformation), and enabling vitality's emergence (temporal.emergence). It operates at individual/community scales and aligns with structural/semantic layers, emphasizing essential resonance and generative/transformational symmetry.

Alternative energy strongly resonates with vitality through its material infrastructure (ontological.material), systemic transformation (temporal.transformation), and ethical imperative (value_generation.ethical). It connects to generative processes (symmetry.generative) and supports ecological sustainability (scale.ecosystem). Lower scores reflect its lack of existential resonance and minimal superficial connections.

Animation strongly resonates with vitality through its capacity to transform static elements into dynamic, lively motion (temporal.transformation, resonance.essential). Its visual nature aligns with aesthetic value and sensory perception, while its structural patterns and semantic meaning in conveying life energy further reinforce these connections.

Atomic energy strongly resonates with ontological.material (physical energy source), symmetry.generative (producing energy), and value.functional (practical utility). It connects to temporal.transformation (changing energy systems) and scale.society (national energy use). Scores are low where it might imply danger (symmetry.destructive kept at 0).

Binding energy resonates most with vitality's essence (resonance.essential), the lived experience of being alive (epistemological.experience), and the relational dynamics that sustain life (ontological.relational). It also reflects the sacred value of sustaining life (value.sacred) and the necessity of its presence (lawfulness.necessary).

Chemical energy is essential to sustaining life's vitality (resonance.essential), operates at the individual biological scale (scale.individual), and underpins material processes (ontological.material). Its predictable role in metabolism (lawfulness.predictable) and functional utility (value_generation.functional) align with the atom's definition. Scores reflect its foundational, ongoing role in living systems without overreaching into broader existential or ethical realms.

The Department of Energy strongly resonates with temporal emergence/establishment (its founding and stabilization), scale.society (national scope), ontological.structural (organizational form), and value_generation.functional (practical energy management). It also aligns with resonance.essential (core role in vitality via energy systems) and symmetry.generative (producing energy solutions).

DOE resonates strongly with scale.individual (embodies vitality as a single living entity), ontological.material (physical presence), and symmetry.generative (vitality as life-creation). Moderate scores reflect its observable vitality (perception/experience), essential resonance with life's core (resonance.essential), and predictable natural state (lawfulness.predictable).

Dynamical strongly resonates with temporal.influence (change over time), scale.individual (personal energy), and epistemological.experience (embodied vitality). It also aligns with ontological.material/relational (physical/lived interactions), resonance.essential (core of being alive), symmetry.transformative (catalyzing change), and value_generation.functional/aesthetic (practical and sensory aspects of energy). Scores reflect its role in active, life-driven processes without leaning toward danger.

Dynamism strongly resonates with individual vitality (scale.individual), the lived experience of energy (epistemological.experience), its essential resonance (resonance.essential), and its role in catalyzing change (interconnection.catalytic and symmetry.transformative). It is aesthetic in nature and operates at a semantic level of meaning.

Elan vital strongly resonates with essential/existential resonance (core essence of life), individual scale, semantic meaning, and transformative symmetry. It emphasizes persistence (continuation), experiential understanding of vitality, and sacred value as a transcendent life force.

The word 'electric' in the vitality context strongly resonates with sudden emergence (e.g., a spark of energy), catalytic influence (triggering reactions), and aesthetic vitality (vibrant, lively energy). It also aligns with sensory perception and the essential core of aliveness, while avoiding danger-related symmetry.

Electrical energy resonates with vitality through its physical presence (material), its role in biological processes (catalytic), enabling transformative life functions (transformative symmetry), and its essential role in vitality's core meaning (resonance.essential). It's identified as part of vitality (epistemological.identification) and has functional value in sustaining life.

Electricity resonates strongly with vitality through its role in powering life-like energy (ontological.material/semantic), enabling transformative societal shifts (temporal.transformation/symmetry.transformative), and catalyzing change (interconnection.catalytic). Its presence in individual/community/society scales reflects its foundational role in sustaining vitality. Lower scores reflect minimal ties to existential/dangerous dynamics or abstract concepts.

Electrify strongly resonates with the core essence of vitality (resonance.essential=8), catalyzing transformative change in others (symmetry.transformative=7 and interconnection.catalytic=7). It directly relates to lived experience (epistemological.experience=6) and aesthetic energy (value_generation.aesthetic=5), while its transient nature avoids over-scoring permanence or danger-related slots.

Energize strongly resonates with individual scale (5) and catalytic interconnection (3), as it directly impacts a person's vitality. It aligns with material (3) and semantic (3) ontological layers, reflecting both physical energy and its meaning. Essential resonance (3) captures its core tie to vitality, while functional value (3) highlights practical energy boosts.

Energy in the context of vitality strongly resonates with essential resonance (core essence of aliveness), material (physical aspect of energy), and experience (embodied knowing). Catalytic and transformative scores reflect its role in triggering action and growth. Lower scores reflect its focus on individual scale and transient temporal aspects.

The Energy Department operates at a societal scale (8) and influences energy systems (catalytic:5), aligning with vitality's focus on life-force. Its policies (informational:6) and structural role (5) support functional utility (7). Lower scores reflect minimal direct ties to existential or essential resonance.

The highest scores reflect vitality's core role (resonance.essential=5), individual experience (epistemological.experience=3), and catalytic influence (interconnection.catalytic=3). Lower scores align with its temporal persistence and scale局限于individuals.

The energy of activation resonates with catalyzing change (interconnection.catalytic, symmetry.transformative) and the essential core of vitality (resonance.essential). It operates at individual and material scales, influences temporal processes, and requires structural understanding.

The highest scores reflect vitality's core (resonance.essential=9) and existential ties (resonance.existential=7), its material basis (ontological.material=6), individual scale (scale.individual=8), and functional value (value_generation.functional=7). Lower scores acknowledge its contingent nature (lawfulness.contingent=5) and experiential comprehension (experience.comprehension=6).

Free energy resonates most strongly with vitality's temporal continuity, individual scale, and material/structural aspects. Its essential resonance (core of being alive) and cyclical patterns (energy fluctuations) align strongly. Lower scores reflect its lack of broader systemic or existential implications beyond the living entity itself.

Heartiness strongly resonates with the individual's vitality (scale.individual 7), the core essence of being alive (resonance.essential 7), and the lived experience of energy (epistemological.experience 6). It also connects to semantic meaning (ontological.semantic 5) and aesthetic value (value.aesthetic 5). Lower scores reflect its personal, non-destructive nature and lack of systemic or existential scope.
Hearty strongly resonates with individual scale (8), material ontology (6), and essential resonance (5). It also relates to perception (5), experience (5), and predictability (5).

Heat resonates most strongly with its physical presence (ontological.material), its role as an essential core of vitality (resonance.essential), its generative potential (symmetry.generative), and its catalytic influence on energy (interconnection.catalytic). Lower scores reflect its experiential embodiment (epistemological.experience), temporal persistence (temporal.continuation), and individual-scale vitality (scale.individual).

Heat as a verb in vitality's context strongly resonates with physical sensation (perception/material), essential resonance with life's energy, and catalyzing transformation/generative processes. It aligns with creation of energy and functional utility, while avoiding destructive/dangerous connotations.

Heat energy resonates strongly with vitality through its material basis (ontological.material), essential role in metabolic processes (resonance.essential), and generative nature in sustaining life (symmetry.generative). It influences biological systems over time (temporal.influence) and aligns with embodied experience (epistemological.experience). Lower scores reflect its limited relevance to non-biological scales or existential themes.

The highest scores reflect 'life force's core essence (resonance.essential), its experiential nature (epistemological.experience=9), and its role in enabling vitality at the individual level (scale.individual=8). It also resonates with catalyzing energy in others (interconnection.catalytic=6) and its predictable patterns (lawfulness.predictable=5).

Light's strongest resonance is with its physical necessity (ontological.material), its role in sustaining ecosystems (scale.ecosystem), and its existential necessity for vitality (lawfulness.necessary). It also connects weakly to bodily experience (epistemological.experience) and catalyzing growth (interconnection.catalytic).

Mechanical energy strongly resonates with material existence (physical systems), functional utility (practical work), and predictable behavior (physics laws). Weaker connections exist in contingent conditions (e.g., fuel dependency), relational aspects (machine parts' interactions), and transformative/generative roles (producing outputs). Scores avoid over-scoring by focusing on core physical and functional ties to vitality's 'energy' aspect.

Nuclear energy strongly resonates with societal scale (scale.society) and material/semantic layers (ontological.material, ontological.semantic) due to its role as a powerful, life-sustaining energy source. It also scores highly in generative symmetry (symmetry.generative) for its capacity to produce energy and in functional value (value_generation.functional) for its practical utility in powering modern societies.

Radiant energy strongly resonates with essential vitality (resonance.essential=9), generative processes (symmetry.generative=8), and embodied experience (epistemological.experience=8). It operates at an individual scale (scale.individual=7) and fosters mutual resonance between entities (interconnection.resonant=7). Its persistence (temporal.continuation=5) and influence over time (temporal.influence=5) align with sustained vitality. Aesthetic value (value_generation.aesthetic=5) and creation (experience.creation=5) reflect its lively, energizing quality.

Radiate strongly resonates with emitting vitality outward (resonance.essential 8), a personal experience (scale.individual 8), and sensory perception (epistemological.perception 7). It catalyzes change (interconnection.catalytic 7) and reflects life's predictable energy (lawfulness.predictable 5). Its aesthetic value (7) captures vitality's beauty.

Radiation resonates with vitality through its association with energy emission (material, semantic layers), scale (stellar/cosmic), and transformative influence. Scores reflect its role in sustained energy release (temporal.permanence) and lawful predictability, while avoiding danger-linked destructive symmetry.

Rest energy resonates with vitality's inherent, enduring nature (temporal.permanence, ontological.material). It operates at individual scale and is essential to existence (resonance.essential). Its predictability aligns with lawful constancy, while its sacredness reflects life's foundational energy.

Separation energy resonates most with catalyzing change (interconnection.catalytic), essential to vitality's core (resonance.essential), and transformative shifts in vitality's nature (symmetry.transformative). It also connects to relational dynamics (ontological.relational) and lived experience (epistemological.experience), while avoiding alignment with danger (symmetric pair STA.danger).

Spark resonates strongly with emergence (sudden start of energy), catalytic (triggers vitality), and generative (creates energy) slots. It also aligns with essential resonance (core of vitality) and aesthetic value (visually evocative). Lower scores reflect its transient nature and lack of connection to danger-related dynamics.

Sparkle strongly resonates with individual vitality (scale.individual), sensory perception (epistemological.perception), and aesthetic beauty (value.aesthetic). It catalyzes energy (interconnection.catalytic) and reflects the essential core of vitality (resonance.essential). Lower scores reflect its transient, non-structural nature and lack of systemic or existential depth.

The verb 'sparkle' strongly resonates with vitality's visual and sensory aspects (epistemological.perception, ontological.material) and its aesthetic appeal (value.aesthetic). It suggests emergence (temporal.emergence) and catalyzes energy (interconnection.catalytic, symmetry.transformative). Lower scores reflect its transient nature and lack of structural or existential depth.

Sparkly strongly resonates with the aesthetic value of vitality (aesthetic 7) and its essential nature (resonance.essential 7). It connects to the semantic layer (semantic 6) as it conveys the essence of aliveness. The catalytic interconnection (5) reflects how vitality can inspire others. Perception (8) and material (3) highlight its sensory, tangible presence. Lower scores reflect its limited connection to systemic scales or existential depths.

Twinkle resonates most with vitality through its visual and experiential qualities (perception, experience), its individual and stellar-scale manifestations, and its essential resonance with life's energy. Scores drop where vitality's symmetric pair (danger) or overly abstract concepts apply.

Twinkly strongly resonates with vitality's liveliness and energy, especially through sensory perception (e.g., stars, eyes), individual expression, and aesthetic beauty. It connects to emergence (first appearances of light), stellar scale (stars), and cyclical patterns (flickering rhythms). Scores remain low for danger-related slots and abstract concepts.

Verve strongly resonates with vitality's core essence (resonance.essential) and individual experience (epistemological.experience). It catalyzes energy in others (interconnection.catalytic) and manifests through aesthetic liveliness (value_generation.aesthetic). Scores are low for danger-related slots (symmetry.destructive) and large-scale phenomena.

Vigor strongly resonates with individual scale (7) and lived experience (7), as it describes a personal state of energy. It aligns with semantic meaning (5) and essential resonance (5), reflecting vitality's core role in being alive. Moderate scores reflect its influence over time (3-5), perceptual awareness (5), and ties to predictable patterns (4).

Vigorous strongly resonates with individual scale (8), material ontology (6), and essential resonance (7), as vitality is inherently tied to physical energy and personal experience. It weakly connects to catalytic influence (4) and contingent lawfulness (2), reflecting how energy drives actions and depends on conditions.

Vigour strongly resonates with individual-scale vitality (scale.individual) and material/semantic layers (ontological.material, ontological.semantic). Its essential resonance (resonance.essential) reflects core aliveness, while symmetry.destructive acknowledges its potential to become pathological (linked to STA.danger). Temporal.influence and lawfulness.predictable reflect vigour's enduring, patterned role in sustaining energy over time.

Vitality strongly resonates with existential and essential resonance (core of life), semantic ontology (meaning of being alive), and individual scale. Scores are low elsewhere due to its focus on personal energy and absence of systemic or relational dynamics.

Vital force strongly resonates with personal experience (epistemological.experience 9) and existential essence (resonance.essential 8). It drives transformation (symmetry.transformative 7) and persists over time (temporal.continuation 7). Its semantic meaning (ontological.semantic 7) and aesthetic quality (value.aesthetic 5) highlight its core role in life's energy.

Vitality resonates most strongly with its core essence (resonance.essential=10) and existential quality (resonance.existential=6), tied to the lived experience (epistemological.experience=9) of being alive. It operates most strongly at the individual scale (scale.individual=8) and is temporally persistent (temporal.continuation=7). Scores drop where vitality's direct, embodied nature contrasts with systemic or abstract categories.

Work in the vitality context strongly ties to functional utility (5), individual effort (3), and material/semantic layers (3 each). It resonates as essential to sustaining energy (3) and aligns with generative outcomes (3) and cyclical rhythms (2). Predictable routines (2) and embodied experience (3) further connect work to vitality's ongoing, life-affirming nature.
